problem id: b487923a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) AND SHR(3)) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00111000 -> 00000001
  10100010 -> 00010101
  10010001 -> 00000100
  01011100 -> 00000010
  10011011 -> 00010100
  00001100 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 00001011

query: 01110101
predicted answer: 00001011
